name: Telegram Userbot
description: Connect your personal Telegram account to OpenClaw via MTProto. Your AI assistant responds as you.
author: overpod

sessionString.description: GramJS session string (run: bun run src/auth.ts)

groups.description: Per-group settings: { groupId: { requireMention: bool, enabled: bool } }
